problem id: 734cba65
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) OR SHR(6)

examples:
  10010100 -> 00101011
  00011100 -> 00111000
  00110111 -> 01101110
  10000010 -> 00000111
  00000011 -> 00000110
  10001011 -> 00010111
  10110000 -> 01100011
  01111100 -> 11111001
  11011000 -> 10110011
  00111011 -> 01110110

query: 00110011
predicted answer: 01100110
